commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/stage4/model-prefetch.yaml /tmp/model-prefetch.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete job model-prefetch -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete cm model-prefetch-script -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get job,pod -n yanxi-validation | grep -E prefetch 2>&1'
